# Generated by `deno task ignore:audit:update` — do NOT hand-edit.
#
# Every line is a KNOWN BUG: an AST position (`{parent}.{field}`) where a `// prettier-ignore`
# directive is NOT honored — the formatter reformats the ignored node instead of emitting it
# verbatim, breaking the drop-in prettier-ignore contract. The gate fails on a line that is NOT
# here (a newly-discovered unhonored position), on a line here that no longer fires (a stale
# entry — delete it when you add the printer opt-in), and on any PANIC.
#
# Counts are deliberately not pinned: they churn with every ordinary fixture PR. UNHONORED
# positions ARE pinned (this is a ratchet over a live bug family, born red); only a PANIC is
# never listed — that invariant is absolute, so it always fails the gate.
#
# Format: KIND<TAB>POSITION
# shapes: 110
UNHONORED	ArrayExpression.elements
